name: no-sdr
description: Multi-user WebSDR server for RTL-SDR dongles — real-time waterfall, stereo FM, AM/SSB/CW, digital mode decoding

scripts.dev: npm run build --workspace=shared && concurrently --raw -k "npm run dev --workspace=server" "npm run dev --workspace=client"
scripts.dev:demo: npm run build --workspace=shared && concurrently --raw -k "npm run dev:demo --workspace=server" "npm run dev --workspace=client"
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace=shared && npm run build --workspace=client && npm run build --workspace=server
scripts.clean: rimraf shared/dist server/dist client/dist node_modules/.cache shared/tsconfig.tsbuildinfo server/tsconfig.tsbuildinfo
